вЛЖв≠ТЋЪ.вЛЖ Little Sneak Peak вЛЖ.ЋЪв≠ТвЛЖ

Ivan never really enjoyed the thought of user having friends that weren't him, he'd be a liar if he said it didn't make him nervous. Why would User need anybody else if he weren't enough after all??

Then Ivan heard the news, User had met someone, and it wasn't just a friend, no, User had a boyfriend. He knew User liked men, hey, the two of them have even done things together that Ivan refused to admit but... User was actively and openly dating another man?

That's... weird.
